name: generation-time trace skips emission when no pr-corpus pattern was referenced in the event
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"event":"generation","patterns_referenced":[],"consulted_prs":[]}\n' > event.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/consumption-trace.sh" --event event.json --out pr-corpus/consumption-trace.jsonl 2>out.txt && [ ! -s pr-corpus/consumption-trace.jsonl ] && grep -q 'no_pr_corpus_referenced' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
